title: Full-Stack Engineer (Freelance)
description: GetYourGuide is a platform for tour guides, excursions, activities and tourist attractions. I worked on improving customer engagement: implementing a homemade solution to support recommendation email campaigns, collaborating with design and CRM teams to put technology at the service of the customer, optimizing the codebase to ensure maximum supportability on a Vue.js SSR project, and improving unit and end-to-end tests.
